definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He denied the serious allegation.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: A claim or assertion that someone has done something illegal or wrong, typically made without proof.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A claim or assertion that someone has done something illegal or wrong, typically made without proof.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The article has a political bias.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The article has a political bias.
definitions.usage_context_en: Prejudice in favor of or against one thing, person, or group compared with another.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Prejudice in favor of or against one thing, person, or group compared with another.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: It's a curious paradox.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: A seemingly absurd or self-contradictory statement that may be true.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A seemingly absurd or self-contradictory statement that may be true.]
